☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Was it in Sans’ plans this morning to get felt up by the human who fell down here? No, not really. But sometimes you just gotta go along with it because if he thinks too hard about how the hell they managed to convince him to let this happen he might just end up more confused. All things considered, things could be worse, right? They could have been a genocidal maniac. But no.. they wanted to feel him up to try and figure out how he stays together even though he told them the answer to stuff like that down here was usually just ‘magic’.

They didn’t seem to like how vague that answer was.

So he brought them to his room — He’d rather do that than risk them getting caught, god knows he’d never live it down — and sat down on the edge of his bed. He didn’t really do anything besides use his magic to unclump his blanket and spread it out over the bed, also taking off his gloves since he assumed they’d at least have the decency to start there instead of somewhere more invasive. ❞
creator: AyoIdk
